RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0040 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Diego Khan Date of Birth: 20/11/1989 SSN (tokenized): TKN-859332 Annual Income: $173,000 Employer: Initech Loan Amount: $47,000 Term (months): 60 Branch: Toronto Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN99460AL Tesla Sportage 2018 EV Used 28,000 Authorized Signature: Diego Khan
